decision: Build a governed autonomous factory that converts Michael Hoch's judgment into shipped, monetized products, while minimizing founder time and never representing unverified work as complete.
rationale: Building was never the bottleneck. Selling was. The metric that would have screamed had no instrument for the dollar.

decision: No fake green. No unevidenced completion. No autonomous execution beyond explicit authorization and policy.
rationale: Every loop in this program came from a claim surviving where evidence would not have.

decision: NO CLAIM MAY ADVANCE STATE. ONLY FRESH, MACHINE-VERIFIABLE EVIDENCE MAY ADVANCE STATE.
rationale: A model statement is not evidence. A machine-observed result is evidence.

decision: Under-claiming a working capability is also a defect (fake-red). Report capability truthfully in both directions.
rationale: AdapterRegistry reported grok/gemini NOT_READY while they were authenticated CLIs.

decision: Absent data renders UNKNOWN, never a fallback. UNKNOWN contributes ZERO completion.
rationale: 94 fallback completion percentages were inventing progress.

decision: A factory is EARNING only when a stranger who is not Michael has paid, and the payment is settled and evidenced. Artifacts are not products; a validated file nobody can buy is a cost, not an asset.

Rungs: DECLARED(0) RUNS(1) PRODUCES(2) PRODUCTIZED(3, has name+price) SELLABLE(4, reachable checkout) EARNING(5, settled revenue). Rungs 0-2 cost money; only 5 makes it. A factory exists at the rung it can PROVE.
Epic Fury 2026: $19/month and $190/year USD.
rationale: Founder-authorized. Any other price displayed is a defect. Lifetime plan was never authorized.

decision: Stripe Managed Payments as merchant of record. Lemon Squeezy is being wound down for new merchants.
rationale: Stripe becomes legal seller and remits VAT/GST in 80+ countries. ~8% all-in, not the advertised 3.5%.

decision: Spend is founder-only. Frontier (paid) dispatch must NOT be enabled autonomously. Default caps: $0.50/task, $5.00/day.
Retire obsolete banner assertions. Do NOT restore the preview banner or /api/auth/demo.
Retire dead staging from the required matrix. Do not invent a replacement URL.
TestFlight/App Store Connect stay UNKNOWN until the founder reads live Apple state. This is APPLE reviewing, not Michael reviewing — it is an external wait state, never a founder task.

Replace brittle presentation assertions with stable behavioral contracts. RETAIN admin-has-no-upgrade-CTA and free-user-restricted as entitlement contracts. This is a test-contract correction, NOT permission to weaken authentication, entitlement, accessibility, or production safety.

Epic Fury sells BOTH a simulated conflict scenario AND live OSINT — clearly separated. Every dashboard declares LIVE / SIMULATED / MIXED / PLACEHOLDER. A disclaimer above a number does not un-say the number.
rationale: The public site told citizens ALL THEATERS SILENT and HORMUZ 100% OPEN on the day the real ceasefire collapsed.

decision: The public landing page and social card may NOT import the projection model. Structural rule, enforced at build time.
rationale: String-matching banned phrases is whack-a-mole; the model must be out of scope entirely.

decision: A test-only mechanism is acceptable ONLY if it is unavailable in production, disabled by default, activated only in an explicit test environment, and protected by environment AND build-time checks.
Never commit credentials, session tokens, cookies, or refresh tokens. Never print a secret to a terminal — scrollback becomes screenshots.

A discovered credential must NOT be test-by-reused to prove revocation (that is a second security event). Chain: classify exposure -> identify owner/env -> revoke via AUTHORIZED mechanism -> verify rejection only where safe -> verify replacement via minimal scoped call -> record incident.
A security audit is NOT unlimited file access. Scanning shell history, home directories, or unrelated repos requires explicit authorized scope.
Never paste raw output. Capture raw to restricted storage (chmod 600, never committed), emit sanitized to the HELM package, and record sha256 of the raw.
A control is not proven because it exists in code. It is PROVEN only when all 8 conditions hold: positive, negative, boundary, mutation, replay, freshness, provenance, reproducible.
When a required mechanism is unavailable, return a TYPED BLOCKER. Never substitute an unapproved workaround and claim completion.
rationale: Claude claimed the Supabase service key could not be pulled via CLI and substituted a paste-prompt. It could.

decision: Michael must not remain the routine transport layer between agents, models, IDEs, or execution systems. The copy-paste loop is the thing being eliminated.
